commands.review_summary:
The branch adds per-agent compaction/contextPruning config, deep-merge resolution, active-agent threading through compaction and maintenance paths, docs/schema baseline updates, and focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows AgentEntrySchema still rejects per-agent contextPruning and resolveAgentConfig does not expose merged per-agent compaction/contextPruning; I did not run config validation because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Maintainers need to accept or narrow the public config/SDK semantics; there is no narrow automated repair to request.

target.title: feat: add per-agent compaction overrides (AI-assisted)
target.body:
## Summary

Adds per-agent `compaction` and `contextPruning` overrides so each configured agent can resolve maintenance/runtime behavior from its active agent scope instead of always inheriting every value from `agents.defaults`.

This is for multi-agent installations where main, channel/proxy, local/self-hosted, and Codex/app-server agents need different compaction, pruning, timeout, thinking-level, and transcript-maintenance behavior.

## Linked Issues And Related Work

Closes #52732

Related: #52751, #69988, #19501, #15826, #43834, #6571, #6572, #30452, #57901, #58077, #59863, #60512, #80784, #82008

## Problem / Root Cause

Before this change, per-agent compaction settings were either rejected by schema or only partially honored. Several runtime paths still read `agents.defaults.compaction` / `agents.defaults.contextPruning` even when the active `agents.list[]` entry had its own settings.

That weakened these setups:

- main/default agent compacts with one model/provider while another agent compacts with another
- local/self-hosted agents use local provider aliases for compaction
- Codex/app-server agents intentionally omit or ignore OpenClaw model overrides and keep native server-side compaction behavior
- legacy/non-agent-shaped session keys still need an explicit non-main `agentId` preserved across queued/direct compaction and maintenance paths
- queued/CLI/context-engine compaction should use `compaction.thinkingLevel`, not the active run's normal thinking level

## What Changed

- Adds strict schema/docs support for `agents.list[].compaction` and per-agent `contextPruning`.
- Deep-merges per-agent `compaction` and `contextPruning` blocks over `agents.defaults`, so partial overrides inherit unspecified fields.
- Resolves compaction model/provider/auth-profile/timeout/cache/pruning/reserve/thinking settings through the active session agent.
- Threads `sessionAgentId` through queued/direct compaction, CLI compaction, context-engine maintenance, Codex app-server lifecycle, embedded cache-TTL finalization, memory flush, transcript rotation, and follow-up/notice paths.
- Keeps explicit OpenClaw `compaction.model` behavior separate from Codex/app-server native runtime selection.
- Adds regression coverage for legacy-session/non-main-agent scope in direct, queued, CLI, Codex lifecycle, cache-TTL, memory-flush, empty/partial merge, and compaction thinking-level propagation paths.

## Reviewer Notes

The key invariant is:

> A compaction run should resolve configuration from the same active agent scope as the session/run that triggered it, even when the session key is legacy-shaped and does not encode `agent:<id>:`.

That is why this PR explicitly passes `agentId` into compaction and maintenance params instead of relying only on parsing `sessionKey`.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior addressed: redacted real multi-agent OpenClaw runtime proof showing different agents loaded with different per-agent `compaction` and `contextPruning` settings, plus an actual live Codex app-server compaction run that correctly refused to treat OpenClaw model overrides as Codex server-side compaction model selection.
- Real environment tested: live hot-patched OpenClaw gateway on `Dev-01`, `OpenClaw 2026.5.22 (054e2f8)`, Node `v24.15.0`, PR branch `feat/agent-compaction-overrides`, head `04170e48eb01fc29f7f3acb1a830c5742b41c3ea`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```text
openclaw config validate
openclaw gateway call config.get
openclaw sessions --all-agents --active 120 --json
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway.service --since '2026-05-23 21:50:00 UTC'
```

- Evidence after fix: live gateway config accepted three Discord-bound proof agents with different per-agent override combinations:

```json
{
  "clawsweeper-proof-flat": {
    "channel": "1507860722950864939",
    "compaction": {
      "mode": "default",
      "model": "openai/gpt-5.4-mini",
      "thinkingLevel": "off",
      "reserveTokens": 2048,
      "keepRecentTokens": 1024,
      "maxHistoryShare": 0.25,
      "identifierPolicy": "off",
      "recentTurnsPreserve": 1,
      "postIndexSync": "off",
      "postCompactionSections": [],
      "timeoutSeconds": 60,
      "notifyUser": true
    },
    "contextPruning": {
      "mode": "cache-ttl",
      "ttl": "1m",
      "keepLastAssistants": 1,
      "minPrunableToolChars": 512,
      "tools": { "allow": ["exec_command", "web_search"] }
    }
  },
  "clawsweeper-proof-nested": {
    "channel": "1507860803968172062",
    "compaction": {
      "mode": "safeguard",
      "model": "github-copilot/gpt-5.4-mini",
      "thinkingLevel": "off",
      "identifierPolicy": "custom",
      "qualityGuard": { "enabled": true, "maxRetries": 1 },
      "midTurnPrecheck": { "enabled": false },
      "memoryFlush": {
        "enabled": true,
        "model": "github-copilot/gpt-5.4-mini",
        "softThresholdTokens": 128,
        "forceFlushTranscriptBytes": "32kb"
      },
      "postIndexSync": "await",
      "timeoutSeconds": 120,
      "notifyUser": true
    },
    "contextPruning": {
      "mode": "cache-ttl",
      "ttl": "30s",
      "keepLastAssistants": 0,
      "minPrunableToolChars": 256,
      "tools": { "deny": ["browser"] },
      "hardClear": { "enabled": true }
    }
  },
  "clawsweeper-proof-transcript": {
    "channel": "1507860850998771823",
    "compaction": {
      "mode": "safeguard",
      "model": "openai/gpt-5.4-mini",
      "thinkingLevel": "minimal",
      "qualityGuard": { "enabled": false },
      "midTurnPrecheck": { "enabled": true },
      "memoryFlush": { "enabled": false },
      "truncateAfterCompaction": true,
      "maxActiveTranscriptBytes": "16kb",
      "keepRecentTokens": 512,
      "recentTurnsPreserve": 0,
      "postIndexSync": "async",
      "timeoutSeconds": 90,
      "notifyUser": false
    },
    "contextPruning": {
      "mode": "cache-ttl",
      "ttl": "10s",
      "keepLastAssistants": 0,
      "minPrunableToolChars": 128,
      "hardClear": { "enabled": true }
    }
  }
}
```

- Evidence after fix: live sessions were created under the distinct agent scopes and channel bindings:

```text
agent:clawsweeper-proof-flat:discord:channel:1507860722950864939
  sessionId=36195e24-d3c0-4b94-b673-0699a597a33f
  provider=openai-codex model=gpt-5.5 contextTokens=272000 totalTokens=59605 compactionCount=1

agent:clawsweeper-proof-nested:discord:channel:1507860803968172062
  sessionId=72060c7e-f8a3-447f-92fe-de14206f5555
  provider=openai-codex model=gpt-5.5 contextTokens=272000 totalTokens=121538

agent:clawsweeper-proof-transcript:discord:channel:1507860850998771823
  sessionId=ddf6b2a9-95d6-4b8f-be92-6a7731f488c3
  provider=openai-codex model=gpt-5.5 contextTokens=272000 totalTokens=66218
```

- Evidence after fix: manual `/compact` on the first proof agent completed through the native Codex app-server compaction path:

```text
2026-05-23T22:03:21.814+00:00 message dispatch started: sessionKey=agent:clawsweeper-proof-flat:discord:channel:1507860722950864939
2026-05-23T22:03:24.567+00:00 ignoring OpenClaw compaction overrides for Codex app-server compaction; Codex uses native server-side compaction
2026-05-23T22:03:26.549+00:00 started codex app-server compaction
2026-05-23T22:03:39.350+00:00 completed codex app-server compaction
```

- Observed result after fix: the live gateway accepted and ran three distinct per-agent config shapes, routed messages to the expected agent/channel scopes, and recorded a real manual compaction on `clawsweeper-proof-flat`. The Codex app-server runtime correctly logged that OpenClaw compaction model overrides are ignored for Codex-native compaction, preventing the PR body from overclaiming model/provider override behavior for Codex app-server sessions.
- What was not tested: the live Codex app-server sessions do not prove that OpenClaw-selected compaction models were used, because Codex owns native server-side compaction. Direct OpenClaw compaction model/provider selection is covered by the source/runtime regression tests below.

## Validation

Acceptance commands requested by ClawSweeper:

```text
node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/agent-scope.test.ts src/agents/pi-settings.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts src/agents/command/cli-compaction.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-memory.test.ts
```

Result:

```text
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.auto-reply.config.ts
Test Files 1 passed (1)
Tests 25 passed (25)

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts
Test Files 4 passed (4)
Tests 115 passed (115)

[test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 19.18s
```

Schema baseline:

```text
node --import tsx scripts/generate-base-config-schema.ts --check
[base-config-schema] ok
```

Config docs baseline:

```text
node --import tsx scripts/generate-config-doc-baseline.ts --check
OK docs/.generated/config-baseline.sha256
```

Note: this docs-baseline check initially caught stale committed hash drift. I regenerated `docs/.generated/config-baseline.sha256`, committed it as `04170e48eb01fc29f7f3acb1a830c5742b41c3ea`, and reran the check successfully.

Additional gate:

```text
git diff --check
passed
```

## Current Branch State

- Base branch: `main`
- Head: `04170e48eb01fc29f7f3acb1a830c5742b41c3ea`
- GitHub reports the PR as mergeable; checks are still running after the latest push.
